description: Pool mm-pool is active with 2 native and 2 external reviewers. Work has been submitted.
assertion: pool_name is mm-pool; multi_model is true; 4 reviewers: code-reviewer, security-reviewer, codex, gemini

description: security-reviewer, codex, and gemini complete successfully. code-reviewer has not responded.
assertion: 3 reviewers completed; code-reviewer absent from completed list; findings_count totals 9 across 3 reviewers

description: code-reviewer process terminates without returning findings. Status is failed.
assertion: reviewer is code-reviewer; status is failed

description: Submitter observes the crash and returns a failed envelope to the host session with error code reviewer_crashed and completed task UUIDs.

error.message: Reviewer code-reviewer did not complete: process terminated

assertion: envelope.status is failed; error.code is reviewer_crashed; metadata contains pool_name mm-pool and 4 task_uuids

description: Host session extracts crashed reviewer name and spawns a fresh code-reviewer via Task tool, requesting both markdown and findings_json outputs.
assertion: invoked_by is submitting_command_host_session; reviewer_name_extracted is code-reviewer; spawn_method is Task tool; both markdown and findings_json formats expected

description: Freshly spawned code-reviewer completes successfully, returning 3 findings in both markdown and findings_json. Source type tagged native-recovery.
assertion: reviewer is code-reviewer; findings_count is 3; has_findings_json is true; source_type is native-recovery

description: D19 partial dedup runs Stages 1 (fingerprint) and 2 (lexical) only against the already-consolidated output from surviving reviewers. Stages 3-6 skipped. Zero CoVe LLM calls.

data.description: Stage 1 fingerprint dedup + Stage 2 lexical dedup only

assertion: stages_run contains exactly [1,2]; stages_not_run contains [3,4,5,6]; cove_llm_calls is 0; dedup_mode is partial

description: 3 recovered findings (post partial-dedup) merged with 9 surviving findings. Full re-consolidation not run. Total findings = 12.
assertion: surviving_findings is 9; recovered_findings_after_dedup is 3; total_findings is 12; full_reconsolidation_run is false

description: Unified report emitted with recovery header notice and native-recovery attribution on recovered findings.

data.report_header_contains: Note: reviewer code-reviewer was recovered from a pool failure.

assertion: report_header_contains includes 'was recovered from a pool failure'; recovered_findings_attribution is native-recovery
